{{.ReleaseLabel}}

AI Prompt Input

Write the task, then send it to whichever models are currently active.

Cypher
Cypher builds a reusable summary map of your project so AI Builders can find the right files without reading the whole codebase every time. Summary Builder updates Cypher summaries. Work Builder ranks relevant files, requests one file at a time, and applies your requested changes.
WireTap
Enter Research Tags to rebuild the reusable WireTap.json. You do not need to rebuild it for each question. Leave tags empty and click Arm to use the existing WireTap during normal Execute Prompt. Max Entries controls how many info-items WireTap collects for the manifest. Default: 200. Runtime Entries controls how many of those entries the AI may use when answering. Default: 75. Lower runtime values are faster and more focused; higher values provide broader context but may reduce focus.
DoubleTap
Set the total Builder-call count. Default 4 means three thinking/critique/refinement calls, then the final answer from the first active Builder. Minimum 2, maximum 20.
Send DeadDrop
Tips

Score tells AI when to stop trying to improve. Revision Level tells AI how free it can be with the revision. Prompts work best when you ask for one specific refinement type per run, examples:

  • Improve sensory setting and seasonal atmosphere. Preserve the plot, characters, dialogue meaning, tone, and ending.
  • Tighten pacing only. Do not add new scenes or change the story events.
  • Improve clean_javascript to reduce JavaScript injection risk. Preserve expected inputs and outputs.
Unresolved Merges will be replaced on prompt execution.

Project Settings

Maximum files Work Mode can create or overwrite from one AI response.

Maximum decoded size of each file Work Mode receives or writes, including generated images. This does not limit files sent to the model.

Upload File or ZIP

Upload one file at a time. ZIP files are extracted into the active project's /projectwork folder.

Import Git Repository

Clone into a temporary folder, then copy the working tree into the active project. .git is excluded.

Import Web Resource

Fetch one URL and save only that single response body into the active project.

Video Jobs

Submit text-to-video or image-guided video jobs, preview completed outputs, and auto-save results into projectwork video revisions.

Optional Reference Images (Not available in all models)
Prompt-only and image-guided jobs are supported for video-capable models configured in the Model Editor.

System Prompt Mode

Default: Balanced. Current selection: Balanced.

Strict Structured Output

Unavailable for this adapter.

Known adapters use built-in transport rules. Provider Options remain optional strict JSON overrides with quoted keys, for example {"options":{"num_ctx":8192}}.

IO Capabilities

Auto uses adapter defaults plus known model hints.

Text input stays enabled because AgentGO always sends instructions and context text.

Video Generation

Video models can run in Waves, but every active model in the run must also be a video model.

3D Mesh Generation

3D models can run in Waves, but every active model in the run must also be a 3D model.

Delete Model?

This will permanently remove this model from models.json and delete its full workspace folder under work_root.
